title: MT Bar Complaint ODC No. 25-147: Supplemental Submission #3 - Cover Letter (September, 2025)
content:
# MT Bar Complaint ODC No. 25-147: Supplemental Submission #3 - Cover Letter (September, 2025)

Office of Disciplinary Counsel
State Bar of Montana

Re: ODC No. 25-147 - Complaint Against Bryan Tipp

Dear Disciplinary Counsel:

This cover letter accompanies Supplemental Submission #3 in the above-referenced matter. The enclosed materials provide additional evidence supporting the original complaint filed against Attorney Bryan Tipp.

## Enclosed Materials

1. Supplemental Submission #3 - Main Document
2. Appendix materials with supporting evidence
3. Timeline documentation
4. Professional standards analysis

## Summary of New Evidence

The enclosed submission provides:
- Additional documentation of professional conduct violations
- Expanded timeline of representation failures
- Updated damages analysis
- Constitutional violations analysis

Respectfully submitted,

Elvis Nuno
Complainant
